name: Entra Active Accounts Without MFA
description: Detects active entra accounts that do not meet MFA requirements.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.display_name AS account_name FROM entra_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.account_enabled, true) = true AND COALESCE(u.mfa_registered, false) = false
remediation: Require MFA enrollment and enforcement for all active accounts.
